title: Miccosukee Reserved Area Amendments Act
stage_label: On motion to refer the bill and the accompanying veto message to the Committee on Natural Resources.
crs_summary: Miccosukee Reserved Area Amendments Act This bill expands the Miccosukee Reserved Area to include a portion of Everglades National Park in Florida that is known as Osceola Camp. The Department of the Interior, in consultation with the Miccosukee Tribe of Indians, must take appropriate actions to protect structures within the Osceola Camp from flooding.
last_action_text: The Chair directed the Clerk to notify the Senate of the action of the House.
